seed_rate.notes: 6 kg/ha for line sowing; 8-10 kg/ha for broadcasting method.

sowing.soil_conditions: Fertile alluvial soils (silty loam) in warm, humid tropical zones.

irrigation.notes: Provide light irrigation. Jute is susceptible to waterlogging at young stages.
Ensure high soil moisture. Fiber yield depends on rapid growth.

fertilizer.notes: NPK enhances early root establishment and stem fiber strength.
High nitrogen dressing stimulates rapid cell division and shoot elongation.

maturity_indicators: Ground leaves begin to drop and stem colors lighten
harvest.harvest_method: Cutting stems manually close to ground level
harvest.notes: Tie stems in bundles, leave in field for 3 days to shed leaves, then submerge in water for retting (15-20 days).
